violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Call for service was placed during the time of inspection. Establishment is to sanitize dishes in the bar 3-bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of both ice machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
